mapper.select: SELECT C.CATEGORY_NAME FROM GENRE G INNER JOIN CATEGORY C ON G.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE MOVIE_ID = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CATEGORY ( CATEGORY_ID , CATEGORY_NAME) VALUES ( 'CT-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_CATEGORY_PK.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') , #{categoryName})
